_comment: Apify actors the app can run (APIFY_AUTO_RUN=true) or run manually in Apify Console, then paste dataset IDs into APIFY_DATASET_IDS in .env.

actors.notes: Pay-per-run on Apify. Each search in apify_indeed_germany.json is one actor run.
Alternative Indeed actor — enable and add apify_indeed_scrapapi.json if you prefer it.
Set actorId to YOUR LinkedIn actor from Apify Console (e.g. curious_coder/linkedin-jobs-scraper). Or run manually and use APIFY_DATASET_IDS only.
